# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Profile Files Upload
Description: Allows logged-in users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_Profile_Files_Upload {
    const UPLOAD_SUBDIR = 'user-files';
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'upf_upload_file_action';
    const NONCE_NAME = 'upf_upload_file_nonce';

    public function __construct() {
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'shortcode'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_assets'));
        add_action('admin_post_upf_upload_file', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_action('admin_post_nopriv_upf_upload_file', array($this, 'handle_upload_no_priv'));
    }

    public function enqueue_assets() {
        wp_register_style('upf-style', false);
        wp_enqueue_style('upf-style');
        wp_add_inline_style('upf-style', '.upf-upload-form{max-width:600px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ddd;background:#fff}.upf-upload-form label{display:block;margin:0 0 8px;font-weight:600}.upf-upload-form input[type="file"],.upf-upload-form input[type="text"]{width:100%;max-width:100%;margin:0 0 15px}.upf-upload-form button{padding:10px 16px;cursor:pointer}.upf-message{margin:0 0 15px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:4px}.upf-success{background:#e8f7e8;border:1px solid #b7e2b7}.upf-error{background:#fde8e8;border:1px solid #f1b3b3}');
    }

    public function shortcode() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="upf-message upf-error">You must be logged in to upload files.</div>';
        }

        $message = '';
        if (!empty($_GET['upf_status'])) {
            if ($_GET['upf_status'] === 'success') {
                $message = '<div class="upf-message upf-success">File uploaded successfully.</div>';
            } elseif ($_GET['upf_status'] === 'error' && !empty($_GET['upf_msg'])) {
                $message = '<div class="upf-message upf-error">' . esc_html(wp_unslash($_GET['upf_msg'])) . '</div>';
            }
        }

        ob_start();
        echo $message;
        ?>
        <form class="upf-upload-form" method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php')); ?>" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <p>
                <label for="upf_upload_file">Upload file</label>
                <input type="file" name="upf_upload_file" id="upf_upload_file" required>
            </p>
            <p>
                <label for="upf_file_label">Label / description (optional)</label>
                <input type="text" name="upf_file_label" id="upf_file_label" maxlength="255" placeholder="Profile picture, ID document, etc.">
            </p>
            <p>
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="upf_upload_file">
                <?php wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_NAME); ?>
                <button type="submit">Upload</button>
            </p>
        </form>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function handle_upload_no_priv() {
        $this->redirect_with_error('You must be logged in to upload files.');
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('You must be logged in to upload files.');
        }

        if (
            !isset($_POST[self::NONCE_NAME]) ||
            !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::NONCE_NAME])), self::NONCE_ACTION)
        ) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Security check failed.');
        }

        if (empty($_FILES['upf_upload_file']) || !isset($_FILES['upf_upload_file']['name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('No file was uploaded.');
        }

        $file = $_FILES['upf_upload_file'];

        if (!empty($file['error']) && (int)$file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Upload failed.');
        }

        $allowed_mimes = array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'          => 'image/png',
            'gif'          => 'image/gif',
            'webp'         => 'image/webp',
            'pdf'          => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'          => 'application/msword',
            'docx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'xls'          => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'ppt'          => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
            'pptx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
            'txt'          => 'text/plain',
        );

        $file_name = sanitize_file_name(wp_unslash($file['name']));
        $check = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file_name, $allowed_mimes);

        if (empty($check['ext']) || empty($check['type'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('File type not allowed.');
        }

        $upload = wp_upload_dir();
        if (!empty($upload['error'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Unable to access upload directory.');
        }

        $target_dir = trailingslashit($upload['basedir']) . self::UPLOAD_SUBDIR;
        if (!wp_mkdir_p($target_dir)) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Unable to create upload directory.');
        }

        $unique_name = wp_unique_filename($target_dir, $file_name);
        $target_path = trailingslashit($target_dir) . $unique_name;

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $target_path)) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Unable to save uploaded file.');
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $label = isset($_POST['upf_file_label']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['upf_file_label'])) : '';

        $attachment = array(
            'post_mime_type' => $check['type'],
            'post_title'     => preg_replace('/\.[^.]+$/', '', $unique_name),
            'post_content'   => $label,
            'post_status'    => 'private',
            'post_author'    => $user_id,
        );

        $attachment_id = wp_insert_attachment($attachment, $target_path, 0);
        if (!is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
            require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';
            $metadata = wp_generate_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $target_path);
            wp_update_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $metadata);

            update_post_meta($attachment_id, '_upf_user_id', $user_id);
            update_post_meta($attachment_id, '_upf_original_name', $file_name);
            update_post_meta($attachment_id, '_upf_custom_label', $label);
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_upf_last_uploaded_file_id', $attachment_id);
        }

        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }

        $redirect = add_query_arg('upf_status', 'success', $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }

    private function redirect_with_error($message) {
        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }
        $redirect = add_query_arg(
            array(
                'upf_status' => 'error',
                'upf_msg'    => rawurlencode($message),
            ),
            $redirect
        );
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }
}

new User_Profile_Files_Upload();
